# Eran Timothy Perera

> Software engineering student and developer based in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
> Builds full-stack systems, DevOps pipelines, and AI-integrated applications.

## About

Eran Timothy Perera is a BSc Software Engineering student at the University of Westminster (via Informatics Institute of Technology, Sri Lanka). He designs and ships production-grade systems across the full stack — from database schemas and REST/WebSocket APIs to CI/CD pipelines and cloud deployments.

- Email: erantimothy@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/EranTimothy-dev
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/erantimothy
- Website: https://www.erantimothy.dev

## Projects

### CorpoVinculo (Featured)
Multi-tenant web platform for event organizers to manage industry outreach and sponsorships. Hybrid monolithic/microservice architecture.
Tech: NestJS, Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Gemini AI, Cloudflare R2, Cloudflare Workers, TanStack Query, Redux
Live: https://corpovinculo.com
GitHub: https://github.com/CorpoVinculo

### YouTube Video & Audio Downloader
Python application for downloading YouTube video and audio with flexible quality options. REST APIs and WebSocket support for async download handling.
Tech: FastAPI, FFmpeg, yt-dlp, WebSockets, Python
GitHub: https://github.com/EranTimothy-dev/YT_VAD-Backend

### Summer Internship Platform
Full-stack web platform for the Rizing summer internship program. Backend development, CI/CD setup, and cloud deployment.
Tech: Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Security, AWS DynamoDB, Cloudflare R2, Azure Container Registry, Azure Container Apps

### ShiftSL
Invited contributor. Comprehensive test suites and codebase refactoring.
Tech: Spring Boot, JUnit, Mockito, Java
GitHub: https://github.com/ShiftSL

### Lottery Management System
Full-stack system for CPN & Sons Pvt Ltd to manage lottery stocks and vendor distribution.
Tech: Spring Boot, Next.js, Supabase, Spring Security
